name: RebarLegFace
summary: Defines a rebar leg face that is used in a RebarSet. Rebar leg faces control how the RebarSet generates the reinforcing bars.

constructors.name: RebarLegFace
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the RebarLegFace class.

constructors.name: RebarLegFace
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the RebarLegFace class using the specified Contour.

properties.name: AdditonalOffset
properties.summary: Gets or sets the user defined offset of the rebars from the rebar leg face.

properties.name: Contour
properties.summary: Gets or sets the outer Contour of the rebar leg face.

properties.name: Frozen
properties.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the leg face is frozen or not.

properties.name: Id
properties.summary: Gets or sets an identifier that may be used to identify instances of the same rebar leg face.

properties.name: LayerOrderNumber
properties.summary: Gets or sets the layer order number of the rebar leg face.

properties.name: Offset
properties.summary: Gets or sets the user defined offset of the rebars from the rebar leg face.

properties.name: OffsetType
properties.summary: Gets or sets the type of offset used to apply the offset value.

properties.name: Reversed
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the cover thickness is opposite to the coordinate system Z direction for the rebar leg face.
